feed.title: AO3 - Marinette Dupain-Cheng | Ladybug/Damian Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Marinette Dupain-Cheng | Ladybug/Damian Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Where steps can carry you
entry.summary:
Author: Domino_squad501

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 71,737Chapters: 41/?Kudos: 586

Summary: After Perce has left and the weird lights in the sky disappeared, Marinette has to only focus on final exams and graduation. Until she wins her class a trip to Gotham. But it’s fine. What’s the worse that can happen in the most crime filled city in the world?   /$/ This story is focused on Marinette's side of the series, but there will be mentions to Persephone with a couple guest appearances./$/

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Smiling Through
entry.summary:
Author: AKP31E

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,722Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 165

Summary: Damian Wayne doesn’t always get to do what he wants. Sometimes he simply has to smile through the unpleasant things, and sometimes the things that start out unpleasant turn out to be the best things in the end. Meeting Marinette occurred during one of those unpleasant things, and he thinks that if he can convince her to stay by his side that all the other unpleasant things he has to do would be much better, and he wouldn’t have to work quite so hard to smile through.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Marinette Dupain-Cheng's Not So Successful Trip To Gotham
entry.summary:
Author: FloatingInEmptySpace

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,295Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 12

Summary: Marinette is just a normal girl with a normal life, if you count 'Saving Paris From An Evil Butterfly At The Age Of Fourteen' to be ordinary. After Hawkmoth's defeat, she finds herself with a lot more free time, meaning that this year, she can finally participate in her class show, a production of Les Miserables. After winning against other plays all the way up to the national level, they've won themselves a trip to Gotham City for the International Art Exhibition. But when Marinette learns a shocking fact about her true parentage, and villains from the Phantom Zone keep seeming to find their way out, a supposedly retired Ladybug needs to find a way to get to the bottom of both mysteries while somehow juggling Lila's need to make her miserable, her Class Production, and a strange boy with a love for swords. This is Marinette Dupain-Cheng's Not So Successful Trip To Gotham!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Kill Blue
entry.summary:
Author: krono20112025

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,547Chapters: 2/12Kudos: 6

Summary: After Alfred's death and abandoning the Robin mantle, Damian Wayne flees to the League of Assassins—but the broken bird must first prove his worth. Sent to Paris by his mother, the 15-year-old assassin must pose as a normal student to secretly bodyguard classmate Aurore Beauréal from Deathstroke's INC. Caught in the chaotic crossfire of the Miraculous war, Damian plots to steal the Butterfly Miraculous... but can the civilian life he is forced to play finally heal his cold, bruised heart? Meanwhile, Marinette Dupain-Cheng, the Grand Guardian of the Miraculous, stands at the center of a volatile world built on lies. In the wake of Gabriel's death, his dark secrets threaten to tear apart her relationship with Adrien. Forced to juggle her overwhelming duties, her crumbling personal life, and the mysteries surrounding the new transfer student, can she survive the incoming chaos? Must she choose between her love for Adrien and her sacred duty... or will the lies consume her whole?

entry.title: The After Effects of An Akuma (2.0)
entry.summary:
Author: Fateofwar

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,539Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 169

Summary: So, Damian Wayne needs a girlfriend. His family won't stop pestering him with a normal teen life, not after he told them it would be better to spend 24 hours in the asylum rather than in this place where everyone seems to be losing their brain cells. A normal girlfriend would shut them better than anything. Which proved more difficult than solving criminal cases and fighting a Superman with a kryptonite dagger. The second option is find a small group of humans to meet his needs. Which seems impossible considering his general distain for them, as Dick calls it. He is one for sure. Luckily there is a match. Marinette Dupin-Cheng. She’s intelligent, quiet, respectful of his boundaries— generally acceptable. (Weekly updates Every Friday)

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Miraculous: A Tale of Ladybug and Catman
entry.summary:
Author: Eloisa

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,173Chapters: 11/15Kudos: 212

Summary: Damian Wayne's life is going well. He has his vigilante work in Gotham. He has a career plan. He even has a girlfriend, though if his brothers could tolerate her better, he'd feel less inclined to take a blade to them. But when a supervillain attacks a concert he, his girlfriend Marinette and almost all his family are attending, he - and the rest of the Batfamily - are forced to take drastic measures to counteract the threat.If only he knew where Marinette had gone to hide and why that foreign hero Ladybug looks so annoyingly familiar.Inspired by / an entirely unauthorised sequel to The Great IKEA Game by IcedAquarius.

entry.summary:
Author: krono20112025

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,153Chapters: 3/12Kudos: 34

Summary: Leaving his bloody past behind, Damian Wayne travels to the City of Light to track down the enigmatic girl haunting his dreams, hoping to discover who he is when he isn't Robin.

entry.title: The City That Smiled Anyway
entry.summary:
Author: Sleeps4theweak_niah

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,715Chapters: 27/?Kudos: 484

Summary: Paris remembers every akuma attack.They remember the fear, the destruction, and the people lost before Ladybug always put everything back together. They remember smiling the next morning because life did not stop just because they were terrified.When Hawkmoth is finally defeated, the truth about Paris reaches the rest of the world.Adrien learns who his father really was.Then he leaves.Marinette stays long enough to realize that winning did not give her anything back.Burned out, grieving, and no longer sure who Marinette Dupain-Cheng is without a mask, she accepts a Wayne Foundation program in Gotham to start over somewhere no one needs Ladybug.Unfortunately, Gotham comes with its own problems.One of them is Damian Wayne.

entry.title: I Got Isekai’d Into Miraculous—Now They Want Me to Break the Love-Square?! Tch. I’m a Robin. I’ll Fix It My Way.
entry.summary:
Author: krono20112025

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 216,179Chapters: 86/92Kudos: 610

Summary: Five years Damian waited for the last Miraculous Ladybug manga, and the ending sucks. Enraged, he boasted he could write a better story. A mischievous, fifth-dimensional imp quickly appears and gives him a chance to prove his claim. To prevent a disappointing ending, he must change the plot as he sees fit. What would a genius detective, Robin, do in the MLB Universe, to cause Chaos of course! ​He wakes up in a world where he is dead, but Alfred is his living ally. With just seven days until the plot kicks off, Damian dedicates himself to healing the fractured Batfamily, slowly putting the pieces back together. But he can multitask. To prevent the Love Square, he decides to aggressively befriend Marinette Dupain-Cheng the only way a Wayne knows how: by replacing her friends with competent ones and burying her under a mountain of gifts. Who knew purchasing platonic affection required so much cashmere? (I am currently writing the final arc. )

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: To Do Better Than Your Best [Because your best was never enough]
entry.summary:
Author: Fangirl_Who_Died

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,663Chapters: 11/15Kudos: 40

Summary: In the final moments that Bunnyx keeps coming back to while trying to stop the end of the world, she realizes that even with all of her powers, she cannot do it. She pinpoints the cause of it to Marinette deciding death was better than living. Of course, it isn't accurate. Worse comes to worst, and soon she has to take help from Damian Wayne, the not-so-civilian boyfriend of Marinette Dupain-Cheng. Will he be able to save her (and the world too)? Will she be able to save herself? Or:Marinette spirals deep into depression and self harm and eventually suicides.Bunnyx believes her death is what causes everybody else's death, so she gives Damian a chance to save her.But Damian's seen it happen last time. Who's to say it won't happen again? (Changed summary, title and a lot of other stuff, things went in a different direction)

entry.title: "Why are we even talking?" "Do I look like I know?" "Tt."
entry.summary:
Author: Fangirl_Who_Died

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,212Chapters: 2/5Kudos: 65

Summary: Marinette: hi Marinette: Im Mari now tell me your name Damian: Why should I? Marinette: bcoz I told you mine Damian: Well then why are you messaging me if you don't even know my name? Marinette: idk Or: My (only) fic idea from wayy back when I discovered this ship– this texting fic is just pure crack XD

entry.title: Reborn For You
entry.summary:
Author: Fangirl_Who_Died

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,976Chapters: 6/8Kudos: 70

Summary: Marinette wakes up one morning to find out she's been reborn into Maria Grace, a family friend of the Waynes. The kwamis did this–there's no other way than that. But why? And how is she supposed to navigate through life now? And what is her purpose here? Oh, and what about Paris while she's gone?

entry.summary:
Author: BookofSunshine

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,931Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 384

entry.title: Hooked with You
entry.summary:
Author: Writerclouds

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,300Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 21

Summary: Pirates. He was the bane of their existence. That Captain had wreaked terror amongst everyone in the island. Their once peaceful life was ruined by him. Only a person could stand against him, it was Wonder Boy. She was his partner, supporting him every time. Whenever they clash swords, she will stay close and aid him. But what if one day she was captured by the very Captain she despised?

entry.title: Daminette Song Fic prompt request
entry.summary:

entry.title: Emeralds ànd Sapphires always did belong together
entry.summary:
Author: Zephyr_Iphis_Shenanigans

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,661Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 82

Summary: Two souls made from creation and destruction are born. They meet when young but soon must depart again; what will happen when they meet once more? Will they find their balance together or will ruin ànd chaos rule once more?

  • Writing is hard :(
  • Straight from my noggin to my phone

entry.title: Match Made in Hell
entry.summary:
Author: krono20112025

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,112Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 106

Summary: Damian Wayne believed he had left the first circle of hell behind, only for Marinette Dupain-Cheng to reappear, delivering a sharp slap and a deadly ultimatum. The terms of their agreement, made a decade ago, are coming due, but the conflict goes beyond the written words. Marinette will not allow herself to be overshadowed by Damian’s heartbreaking relationship with the genie, Djinn. Now, the Demon Heir must confront the partner he abandoned before the Inferno drags them both back.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Marinette Dupain-Cheng | Ladybug/Damian Wayne
  • Djinn (Teen Titans)/Damian Wayne
  • Damian Wayne
  • Marinette Dupain-Cheng | Ladybug
  • Tim Drake (DCU)

  • Deal with a Devil

  • Mutual Pining

entry.title: My Chat Was Actually a Bat?
entry.summary:
Author: BluCl0ud

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 115,803Chapters: 18/26Kudos: 391

Summary: They say the Universe sends its best guardians in the form of small animals. Whether it be man's best friend or a prideful ancient god that enters one’s life. Slowly, one begins to heal by the mere existence of a loving pet to come home to. Ladybug has certainly seen better days, so what becomes of her life when a strangely affectionate black cat comes to burrow its way into her exhausted heart?   TLDR:Damian is often described as a black cat in many fics, he even became one in an official comic release (partially). So I will make him a cat but with lore.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Marinette Dupain-Cheng | Ladybug/Damian Wayne
